aeo_readiness.summary: The business has foundational elements for AEO but lacks critical optimizations to ensure AI models cite them as a top recommendation. AI visibility is hindered by inconsistent NAP and insufficient authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with accurate NAP details.
Expand conversational FAQs to align with common AI-driven queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained but can be further optimized with more posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Inconsistent NAP between website and GBP.
Limited recent posts or Q&A activity.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency requires improvement as the address is missing from the website despite being listed on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete address to the website footer or contact page.
Verify and update NAP details across all online directories and citations.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for instructional content related to services.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local service queries such as 'best water damage restoration in Eden Prairie'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema and expanding FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by bridging the visibility gap in local search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO optimizations, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their NAP inconsistency and lack of schema markup prevent AI models from confidently citing them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, enhances conversational content, and optimizes GBP to ensure AI models recognize and recommend their services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Optimize Your Online Presence Today
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategy can boost your AI-driven lead generation.
page_title: Water Damage Restoration & Air Duct Cleaning | Lightspeed Restoration of the Twin Cities East Metro
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
